zh.Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Burga de Stuteville於1146年出生在英國越可爾可廷加姆時，她的父親Robert de Stuteville IV31歲，母親Helwise de Murdac25歲。她於1169年之前與William de Vesci在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年之後在英國越可爾可納雷斯波洛，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Burga de Stuteville于1146年出生在英国越可爾可廷加姆时，她的父亲Robert de Stuteville IV31岁，母亲Helwise de Murdac25岁。她于1169年之前与William de Vesci在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年之后在英国越可爾可納雷斯波洛，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Burga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘inaccessible’, an epithet of the wife of Shiva, because of her propensity for prolonged meditation. Durga represents her terrifying form, reflecting her anger when disturbed.

en.lifeSummary: When Burga de Stuteville was born in 1146, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert de Stuteville IV, was 31 and her mother, Helwise de Murdac, was 25. She married William de Vesci before 1169, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1185, in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Burga de Stuteville est née en 1146, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville IV, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Helwise de Murdac, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William de Vesci avant 1169, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1185, à Knaresborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Burga de Stuteville 1146 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Stuteville IV 31 und ihre Mutter Helwise de Murdac 25. Sie hat vor 1169 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England William de Vesci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1185 in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Alnwick, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Burga de Stuteville è nata il nel 1146 nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Stuteville IV, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Helwise de Murdac, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William de Vesci prima del 1169, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1185, nel Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Alnwick, Northumberland, England.

ja.Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック
ja.lifeSummary: Burga de Stutevilleが1146年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IVは31歳，母Helwise de Murdacは25歳であった。1169年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでWilliam de Vesciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアナレスボロウで死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Burga de Stuteville(이)가 1146년 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville IV(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helwise de Murdac(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1169년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 William de Vesci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 이후 영국 요르크실르 나레스버루그h에서 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에 묻혔다.

mn.Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England: Alnwick, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Burga de Stuteville nasceu em 1146, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville IV, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Helwise de Murdac, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Vesci antes 1169, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1185, em Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Burga de Stuteville родилась в 1146 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville IV было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Helwise de Murdac, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Vesci перед 1169 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1185 г. в местности наресбороую, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Burga de Stuteville nació en 1146, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville IV, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Helwise de Murdac, tenía 25 años. Se casó con William de Vesci antes de 1169, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1185, en Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
